title: Create: Above the Clouds
description: A sky-island survival pack centered around create aeronautics, and custom world generation.
body:
**Create: Above the Clouds** is a sky island survival pack built for engineers and pilots. The world is made of custom floating islands, and your goal is to conquer the skies using cogs, engines, and airships. By combining the Create mod with Create: Aeronautics, you can build real, moving flying machines to travel between islands and transport your items.

You will start isolated on a single island where you must build factory machines, windmills, and automatic assembly lines. As you progress, you can design and fly your own custom airships, ranging from small scouting planes to massive moving factories that use real physics. The world generation is highly customized.
